why: Login-user cache eviction is @Async (fire-and-forget); after an admin edit it races/lags so the stale JwtUserDto (with the old password hash) survives until TTL expiry, making the login password check fail.
Admin profile/role edit path; it saves the user and only calls delCaches->flushCache->cleanUserCache (async), so the login cache is not reliably/synchronously invalidated after the edit.
Sole hook that evicts the login-user cache (delegates to the async cleanUserCache); must guarantee synchronous eviction before login can re-read.
Returns the cached JwtUserDto whose password is fed into passwordEncoder.matches() at login; serves stale cached credentials when the cache was not invalidated by the edit.
